title: The NoFog Mod
description: A simple Fabric/(Neo)Forge mod that removes Minecraft's annoying fog.
body: # A simple mod that removes fog. ‎ ‎ --- ## This mod has no config, no complicated settings or features. ### It just removes fog from the game. That's it. ***:)*** --- #### Incompatible Mods: - OptiFine/OptiFabric - [The Speedrunner Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/speedrunner-mod), [Simple Keybinds](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-keybinds), and [Quality of Queso](https://modrinth.com/mod/quality-of-queso) - These mods already have an option to remove fog built-in to them. --- Created by Dillon8775.
